creator: freebsd@dev.thsi.be
text:
Created attachment 252073
coccinelle-1.2.patch

Please apply the patch to update devel/coccinelle from 1.1 to 1.2.
This update replaces the bundled copy of the stdcompat library with a snapshot from github, to allow building with OCaml 5.2. Feel free to drop that part from the patch.
